express-service.description: Generator that creates an Node/Express based backend service.

react-app.description: Generator that creates a React/Redux based frontend application.

mern.description: Generator that creates a MERN fullstack solution.

dotnet-service.description: Generator that creates a ASP.NET Core backend service.

react-dotnet.description: Generator that creates a React-Dotnet fullstack solution.

react-form.description: Generator that creates a React component based on an ADSP Form Definition.

react-task-list.description: Generator that creates a React component based on an ADSP Task Queue.

angular-app.description: Generator that creates a Angular based frontend application.

vue-app.description: Generator that creates a Vue 3 frontend application using GoA web components.

vue-components.description: Ensures the shared GoA Vue wrapper library (interim). Invoked by vue-app; runnable directly to repair.

mean.description: Generator that creates a MEAN fullstack solution.

pern.description: Generator that creates a PERN fullstack solution.

pean.description: Generator that creates a PEAN fullstack solution.

pevn.description: Generator that creates a PEVN fullstack solution.

mevn.description: Generator that creates a MEVN fullstack solution.
